params.description: Data table appears. Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.

beats.text: Last one! Here are scores from four teams. Yellow Team won with 70 points.
You've done this vertical and horizontal now. Same process every time: check the numbers, choose the scale.
Which scale works best for this data?
Which scale works best for this data?

validator.description: Student selected Scale of 10, correct, most efficient for values ending in 0 or 5, range up to 70

beats.text: Good choice. All values end in 0 or 5, and the biggest is 70. Scale of 10 gives you a clean graph.

validator.description: Student selected Scale of 1, would need many axis lines

beats.text: That would need a lot of lines on the axis. All the values end in 0 or 5—which bigger scale would be easier to read?

validator.description: Student selected Scale of 2, would need many axis lines

beats.text: That would need a lot of lines on the axis. All the values end in 0 or 5—which bigger scale would be easier to read?

validator.description: Student selected Scale of 5, works but not most efficient given max value 70

beats.text: That works! But notice the biggest value is 70. Scale of 10 would give you fewer lines and still show everything exactly.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Bar graph (horizontal orientation, building mode) with scale selection active. Team Scores dataset. Scale Preview System available.

params.description: Bar graph updates to building mode with Scale of 10 active. Horizontal orientation. Axis 0–80 showing tick marks at 0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80. Empty graph ready for bar placement.

beats.text: Now create the graph. Place each bar at the right length.
Click to place the bar for Red Team at 25 points.
Click to place the bar for Red Team at 25 points.

validator.description: Student set Red Team bar to 25, correct

beats.text: Right at 25—halfway between 20 and 30.

validator.description: Student placed Red Team bar at incorrect height

beats.text: 25 is halfway between 20 and 30. Find that spot.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Horizontal bar graph in building mode. Scale of 10. Axis 0–80. Red Team bar set at 25. Blue, Green, Yellow bars not yet placed.

beats.text: Click to place the bar for Blue Team at 40 points.
Click to place the bar for Blue Team at 40 points.

validator.description: Student set Blue Team bar to 40, correct

beats.text: Right on 40.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Horizontal bar graph in building mode. Scale of 10. Axis 0–80. Red Team bar at 25, Blue Team bar at 40. Green and Yellow bars not yet placed.

beats.text: Click to place the bar for Green Team at 55 points.
Click to place the bar for Green Team at 55 points.

validator.description: Student set Green Team bar to 55, correct

beats.text: 55—halfway between 50 and 60.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Horizontal bar graph in building mode. Scale of 10. Axis 0–80. Red Team bar at 25, Blue Team bar at 40, Green Team bar at 55. Yellow bar not yet placed.

beats.text: Click to place the bar for Yellow Team at 70 points.
Click to place the bar for Yellow Team at 70 points.

validator.description: Student set Yellow Team bar to 70, correct

beats.text: Right on 70.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Horizontal bar graph in building mode. Scale of 10. Axis 0–80. All four bars placed: Red Team at 25, Blue Team at 40, Green Team at 55, Yellow Team at 70.

beats.text: That's it. You chose the scale and placed every bar exactly where it should be, some exactly on the lines and some halfway between.

elements.description: Data table showing Team Scores. Red Team: 25, Green Team: 55, Yellow Team: 70, Blue Team: 40.
Horizontal bar graph completed. Scale of 10. Axis 0–80. All four bars displayed: Red Team at 25, Blue Team at 40, Green Team at 55, Yellow Team at 70.
